definition: Wholesome thinking of non-harming in the MN 19 twofold division.
notes: Use this record in MN 19-style analytical and practical contexts. Keep the phrase concrete as non-harming and do not replace it with more diffuse kindness or compassion language.

example_phrases.notes: Third member of the wholesome class in MN 19.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for MN 19-style ethical analysis of wholesome thinking shaped by non-harming.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not broaden the phrase into compassion-language or weaken it into abstract harmlessness when the practical non-harming force matters.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the compound from drifting away from practical non-harming.
